command: set -euo pipefail; PROJECT_ROOT="${NEXUS_PROJECT_ROOT:-$PWD}"; if [ -f "$PROJECT_ROOT/config/scripts/run_copy_env.sh" ]; then source "$PROJECT_ROOT/config/scripts/run_copy_env.sh" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi; if [ -f "$PROJECT_ROOT/config/scripts/resolve_kb_ingest_password.sh" ]; then source "$PROJECT_ROOT/config/scripts/resolve_kb_ingest_password.sh"; nexus_resolve_kb_ingest_password || true; fi; if [ -z "${KB_INGEST_PASSWORD:-}" ] && [ -n "${NEXUS_KB_INGEST_PASSWORD:-}" ]; then export KB_INGEST_PASSWORD="$NEXUS_KB_INGEST_PASSWORD"; fi; if [ -z "${KB_INGEST_PASSWORD:-}" ]; then echo 'KB_INGEST_PASSWORD ausente'; exit 1; fi; cd "$PROJECT_ROOT/src/agente_intermediario"; if [ -x target/release/agente_intermediario ]; then exec target/release/agente_intermediario; else exec cargo run --release; fi

set -euo pipefail; PROJECT_ROOT="${NEXUS_PROJECT_ROOT:-$PWD}"; if [ -f "$PROJECT_ROOT/config/scripts/run_copy_env.sh" ]; then source "$PROJECT_ROOT/config/scripts/run_copy_env.sh" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi; export POSTGRES_USER=kb_ingest; export POSTGRES_INGEST_USER=kb_ingest; if [ -f "$PROJECT_ROOT/config/scripts/resolve_kb_ingest_password.sh" ]; then source "$PROJECT_ROOT/config/scripts/resolve_kb_ingest_password.sh"; nexus_resolve_kb_ingest_password || true; fi; if [ -z "${KB_INGEST_PASSWORD:-}" ] && [ -n "${NEXUS_KB_INGEST_PASSWORD:-}" ]; then export KB_INGEST_PASSWORD="$NEXUS_KB_INGEST_PASSWORD"; fi; if [ -z "${KB_INGEST_PASSWORD:-}" ]; then echo 'KB_INGEST_PASSWORD ausente'; exit 1; fi; cd "$PROJECT_ROOT/src/validador"; if [ -x target/release/nexus_validador ]; then exec target/release/nexus_validador; elif [ -x target/release/validador ]; then exec target/release/validador; else exec cargo run --release; fi
